title: Property Consultant - Lodha Group Digital Technologies - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Lodha Group Digital Technologies - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
We at Lodha Group Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Varanasi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Lodha Group Digital Technologies:
Lodha Group Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lodha Group Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
